---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for ATLAS
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Summary

<!-- One sentence: what do you want ATLAS to do that it can't do today? -->

## Problem / Motivation

<!-- What problem does this solve? Who is affected? How often?
     "I'm always frustrated when..." is a good starting point -->

## Proposed Solution

<!-- Describe your ideal implementation. It doesn't have to be technical — 
     "as a user, I want to ask ATLAS about X and get Y" is fine -->

## Alternatives Considered

<!-- What workarounds or alternatives have you tried? Why don't they work? -->

## ATLAS Component

- [ ] Data model (models/)
- [ ] MCP tools (src/index.js)
- [ ] Connector (email / filesystem / api)
- [ ] Storage / query engine
- [ ] CLI / config
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Other: ___

## Example Usage

<!-- How would this feature be used? Show an example tool call, config, or workflow -->

```json
// Example: how you'd call the new MCP tool
{
  "tool": "new_tool_name",
  "params": {
    "example": "value"
  }
}
```

## Additional Context

<!-- Screenshots, related issues, links to specs, prior art in similar tools -->
